questions.question: Which .NET feature maps incoming HTTP requests to methods?
Which .NET attribute defines an API route?
Which .NET attribute is commonly used to require authentication on an endpoint?
What is the purpose of middleware in ASP.NET?
answers: To intercept and process HTTP requests and responses
questions.correctAnswer: To intercept and process HTTP requests and responses

questions.question: Why should APIs return DTOs instead of database entities?
answers: To control what data is exposed and decouple internal models
questions.correctAnswer: To control what data is exposed and decouple internal models

questions.question: What .NET feature allows services to be injected into controllers?
Which ASP.NET pipeline component handles authentication before controllers run?
Why should APIs avoid returning database entities directly?
answers: To control exposed fields and prevent tight coupling
questions.correctAnswer: To control exposed fields and prevent tight coupling

questions.question: What pattern is commonly used in .NET APIs to separate logic from controllers?
